cards.title: Rishikesh River Reset
cards.card_description: 2D1N rafting, cafes, river walks, and peaceful evening aarti.
cards.detailed_description: A compact weekend plan with pickup support, riverside stay options, rafting slots, cafe hopping, and a guided Ganga aarti visit. Designed for travellers who want the trip to feel full without becoming tiring.

images.detail: Morning riverfront views and soft walking routes near the ghats.
Adventure add-ons can include rafting, short hikes, and cafe trails.
Evening plans are paced around local food and river aarti timing.

cards.title: Manali Workcation Residence
cards.card_description: Monthly stay with workspace, Wi-Fi, weekend trails, and team add-ons.
cards.detailed_description: Built for remote employees and small teams who need predictable Wi-Fi, stay support, laundry options, food coordination, and weekend exploration without planning every detail from scratch.

images.detail: Long-stay rooms are selected for comfort, light, and reliable daily routines.
Weekend route options can be added without disturbing workdays.

cards.title: Custom Himalayan Journey
cards.card_description: Pick your number of days, stay category, transport, and activities.
cards.detailed_description: A flexible plan for travellers who already have a rough idea but want local guidance to make it practical. You can decide the number of days, places, transport comfort, food preferences, and activity level.

images.detail: Custom plans balance scenic roads, rest time, and local experiences.
Routes can be adjusted for families, friends, couples, or solo travellers.
